Framework Source Extraction PoC

This page simulates framework internals for testing selector extraction.

React ≤17 (with _debugSource)

React 17 element with file + line + component

React 18+ (component name only)

React 18 element with component only

React 19 (_debugStack only)

React 19 element with _debugStack

Vue 3 (__vueParentComponent)

Vue 3 element with file + component

Vue 2 (__vue__)

Vue 2 element with file + component

Angular (ng.getComponent)

Angular element with component

Preact (__P.__k)

Preact element with component

Vanilla (no framework, data-testid)

Vanilla element with data-testid

Vanilla (CSS fallback only)

Vanilla element — CSS selector only

Proto-id (highest priority)

Element with data-proto-id
